back_translation: And it was after many days, after the LORD had given rest to Israel from all their enemies all around, and Joshua was old, advanced in days.
Joshua called for all Israel — for their elders, for their heads, for their judges, and for their officers — and he said to them, 'I am old, I have come in days.'
'And you have seen all that the LORD your God has done to all these nations from before you, because the LORD your God — He is the one who fights for you.
See, I have allotted to you these remaining nations as an inheritance to your tribes, from the Jordan, and all the nations which I have cut off, and the Great Sea where the sun sets.
And the LORD your God — He will push them out from before you and drive them out from before you, and you shall take possession of their land, just as the LORD your God spoke to you.
And be very strong to keep and to do all that is written in the Book of the Law of Moses, not to turn aside from it right or left,
not to come (associate) with these nations remaining with you. And in the name of their gods you shall not mention, and not swear, and not serve them, and not bow down to them.
Rather, in the LORD your God you shall hold fast, as you have done to this day.
The LORD has driven out from before you great and powerful nations; and as for you, no man has stood before you to this day.
One man of you shall chase a thousand, because the LORD your God — He is the one who fights for you, just as He spoke to you.
Therefore you shall be very careful for your souls, to love the LORD your God.
For if turning, you turn away and cling to the rest of these nations, these remaining with you, and you intermarry with them and come into them and they into you,

knowing you shall know that the LORD your God will no longer drive these nations out from before you. And they shall be to you for a snare and a trap and a scourge in your sides and thorns in your eyes, until you perish from upon this good ground which the LORD your God has given you.

And behold, I am going today the way of all the earth, and you know with all your heart and with all your soul that not one word has fallen from all the good words which the LORD your God spoke concerning you; everything came to you, not one word has fallen from it.

And it shall be — just as every good word which the LORD your God spoke to you came upon you, so the LORD shall bring upon you every evil word until His destroying you from upon this good ground which the LORD your God has given you.

When you transgress the covenant of the LORD your God which He commanded you, and you go and serve other gods and bow down to them, then the anger of the LORD will burn against you, and you shall perish quickly from upon the good land which He has given you.'
